meaning: The National Science Foundation,国家科学基金会
examples: For example, most universities that joined the NSF network had intracampus computer networks.
This new NSF network attracted more and more institutional users, many of which had their own internal networks.
Query View is a new type of NSF view.
Since the founding of the NSF, there has been bipartisan support for government-university partnerships.
The NSF receives about 40, 000 proposals per year and awards grants to about 11, 000 of them.
